full_text:
Intro tweet: On #WorldCancerResearchDay, we’re reflecting on why we dedicate our work to cancer research👩‍🔬🎗️👨‍🔬. Stay tuned as some of our lab members share what motivates them to make a difference in this field🌍💙 #wecan #workingtogether #collaboration

Tweet 2: Here’s why @afarkkila, our PI, is committed to cancer research: "With our truly translational setting and interdisciplinary team, we are in such a unique position to impact patients’ lives." #WorldCancerResearchDay

Reply to tweet 2: @Syopapotilaat @Syopajarjestot @gysysuomi @HUS_fi @HelsinkiUniMed @iCAN_Finland @FIMM_UH @LiljestromMarke

Tweet 3: Here’s why Anna Nylund from our lab is committed to cancer research: Cancer is one of the leading causes of death, and I’m highly motivated to find answers that can save more lives. #WorldCancerResearchDay

Reply to tweet 3: @Syopapotilaat @Syopajarjestot @gysysuomi @HUS_fi @HelsinkiUniMed @iCAN_Finland @FIMM_UH @LiljestromMarke @WCRD24Sept

Tweet 4: Here’s why Aino Elomaa from our lab is committed to cancer research: "I want to work on something that feels meaningful, and with cancer being such a common disease, it’s a way to make a real difference." #WorldCancerResearchDay

Reply to Tweet 4: @Syopapotilaat @Syopajarjestot @gysysuomi @HUS_fi @HelsinkiUniMed @iCAN_Finland @FIMM_UH @LiljestromMarke @WCRD24Sept

Tweet 5: Here’s why @adajnq from our lab is committed to cancer research: "Cancer is not just a disease, it’s a lens through which we can uncover the mysteries of life at its core. I want to shape a better future for patients." #WorldCancerResearchDay

Reply to Tweet 5: @Syopapotilaat @Syopajarjestot @gysysuomi @HUS_fi @HelsinkiUniMed @iCAN_Finland @FIMM_UH @LiljestromMarke @WCRD24Sept

Tweet 6: Here’s why @MariaMHincapie from our lab is committed to cancer research: "Cancer still claims too many lives, and I want to use my skills to change that. That’s why I’m dedicated to advancing cancer research and improving outcomes for patients." #WorldCancerResearchDay

Reply to Tweet 5: @Syopapotilaat @Syopajarjestot @gysysuomi @HUS_fi @HelsinkiUniMed @iCAN_Finland @FIMM_UH @LiljestromMarke @WCRD24Sept

Tweet 7: Wrapping up #WorldCancerResearchDay with some exciting news—our latest paper has been accepted for publication! 🎉 We’re celebrating with cake, sparkling wine, and renewed energy to keep pushing forward in the fight against cancer. 🍰🥂 #wecan #workingtogether

Reply to Tweet 7:
